description: A machine-only engine for defining and executing recurring, multi-step routines.

steps.description: Ordered list of actions the routine should perform.

schedule.description: When or how often the routine should run.

failure_policy.description: What the agent should do if a step fails.

workflow.action: Agent loads routine definition and schedule.
Agent executes each step in order, respecting dependencies.
If a step fails, apply the defined failure policy.
Agent logs execution results in a machine-readable summary.
